case_title: DOUGLAS H PARK VS. COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PARK, DOUGLAS H (SENATOR HOTEL ) AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE $50.00 SERVED JAN-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY BRIAN QUINN--SR. ASSET MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARK, DOUGLAS H (SENATOR HOTEL ) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
